title: Recent Timeline
sortOrderDesc: Choose how to sort content items in each card. By update time: most recently updated first. By document order: keep the original position order in the document.
ignoreContentPlaceholder:
One ignore rule per line
Example:
blank line
ignoreContentDesc: Enter one content text per line to ignore. Content that exactly matches any line in the ignore list will be hidden from cards.
truncateDesc: Max lines per content item. Excess will be truncated. Hover to see full content. Set to 0 to disable truncation.
jumpMethodDesc: openTab: millisecond-level jump via plugin API, supports zoom-in control. SiYuan Link: opens via siyuan:// protocol, behaves like native block reference.
zoomInDesc: When enabled, clicking a card item will zoom into the target block. When disabled, the document opens without focusing on the specific block. Only applies to openTab jump method.
refreshDelayDesc: How many seconds to wait after editing before auto-refreshing the timeline. Set to 0 to disable auto-refresh (manual refresh only).
